name: Implement CircuitBreaker CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN state machine
desc: Build src/resilience/circuit-breaker.js with failure counting, phi-exponential backoff recovery timeout, and half-open probe — wire into all service calls

name: Wire circuit breaker into InferenceGateway model calls
desc: Wrap every LLM provider call in circuit-breaker.js — trip on 3 consecutive failures, recover after phi^5*1000ms

name: Wire circuit breaker into brain API endpoints
desc: Wrap brain_api.js fetch calls with circuit breaker — track per-endpoint health, failover to backup endpoints on OPEN state

name: Wire circuit breaker into Cloudflare Worker calls
desc: Wrap CF Worker API calls with circuit breaker to prevent cascade failures when edge is unreachable

name: Wire circuit breaker into PostgreSQL connection pool
desc: Add circuit breaker around pg.Pool.query() — trip on connection timeout, protect main service loop from DB failures

name: Implement Saga Orchestrator with compensating transactions
desc: Build src/orchestration/saga-orchestrator.js — define saga steps for HeadyBrain->Soul->Battle->MC flow with rollback handlers for each failed step

name: Wire Saga Orchestrator into HCFullPipeline multi-service transactions
desc: Replace linear pipeline calls with saga transactions — on stage failure, trigger compensating rollback to restore consistent state

name: Build HeadyBee Factory at 10K scale
desc: Replace morph-engine.js with full bee-factory.js supporting spawn/manage/retire lifecycle, health monitoring, resource pooling, and Fibonacci-stepped scaling

name: Implement bee spawn lifecycle (SPAWNING->ACTIVE->RETIRING->DISSOLVED)
desc: Build state machine for each bee with spawn() health-check, execute() retry, report() result, and retire() cleanup lifecycle

name: Build bee health monitoring with phi-scaled heartbeat
desc: Track bee last-seen timestamp, emit bee:stale event after phi^8 interval with no heartbeat, auto-retire stale bees

name: Implement bee resource pooling (hot/warm/cold)
desc: Assign bees to resource pools with concurrency limits — hot:34%, warm:21%, cold:13% of available capacity

name: Implement Bulkhead isolation for service resource pools
desc: Build src/resilience/bulkhead.js with per-service concurrency limits — prevent a single hungry service from starving 20 others

name: Wire bulkhead into heady-buddy, heady-coder, and heady-battle
desc: Apply bulkhead limits: buddy=13 concurrent, coder=8, battle=5 — enforce via semaphore in each service handler

name: Implement Event Store for immutable event log
desc: Build src/events/event-store.js — append-only log of all state transitions with SHA-256 hash chain for tamper detection

name: Wire Event Store into HCFullPipeline stage transitions
desc: On each pipeline stage entry/exit, append immutable event to event store for time-travel debugging and audit

name: Wire Event Store into HeadyBuddy decision log
desc: Replace appendFileSync audit log with event store writes — durable, queryable, and tamper-evident

name: Implement CQRS Bus with command/query separation
desc: Build src/cqrs/cqrs-bus.js — separate command bus (write, async) from query bus (read, sync) for HeadyBuddy+HeadyCoder workloads

name: Wire CQRS into HeadyBuddy chat (query) vs HeadyCoder tasks (command)
desc: Route buddy chat queries through fast query bus and coder task submissions through durable command bus with retries

name: Implement Self-Healing Mesh with service discovery
desc: Build src/mesh/self-healing-mesh.js — services auto-register on startup, auto-deregister on shutdown, mesh re-routes on failure

name: Wire Self-Healing Mesh into heady-manager bootstrap
desc: At boot, register all 20 services in the mesh — on unhealthy health probe, trigger mesh rebalance and notify auto-success engine

name: Implement Auto-Tuner for dynamic configuration updates
desc: Build heady-config-server.js with watch endpoints — services can receive config updates without restart via long-poll or SSE

name: Wire Auto-Tuner into circuit breaker thresholds
desc: Allow circuit breaker failure threshold to be dynamically adjusted via config server without service restart

name: Implement Hot-Cold Router for data tiering
desc: Build src/routing/hot-cold-router.js — route hot data (accessed in last 5min) to RAM, warm to Redis, cold to PostgreSQL

name: Add queryMemory() method to VectorMemory class
desc: Add queryMemory(query, limit, threshold) as alias for search() in vector-memory.js to fix buddy-core.js:632 runtime error

name: Add ingestMemory() method to VectorMemory class
desc: Add ingestMemory(key, content, metadata) as alias for store() in vector-memory.js to fix self-awareness.js:173 runtime error

name: Build PgVector adapter for VectorMemory production backend
desc: Create src/adapters/pg-vector-adapter.js wrapping pg.Pool with memory_vectors table + HNSW index, wire into VectorMemory as optional backend

name: Implement Hallucination Detection Watchdog
desc: Build src/observability/hallucination-watchdog.js — compare LLM output against vector memory facts, flag contradictions with CSL confidence score

name: Wire Hallucination Watchdog into HeadyBuddy response pipeline
desc: After every buddy response, pass it through hallucination watchdog before delivering to user — log and flag suspicious outputs

name: Wire Hallucination Watchdog into ARENA stage outputs
desc: After each competitor produces output in ARENA, run hallucination check — penalize score for contradictions against workspace facts

name: Implement Swarm Consensus with CSL-weighted voting
desc: Build src/intelligence/swarm-consensus.js — when HeadyBrain, HeadySoul, and HeadyGrok disagree, resolve via phi-weighted confidence voting

name: Wire Swarm Consensus into HeadyCouncil deliberations
desc: Replace first-wins resolution in council.js with consensus voting — highest CSL-weighted agreement wins the deliberation

name: Build HeadyAPI public gateway at headyapi.com
desc: Build src/api-gateway/heady-api-gateway-v2.js with REST+GraphQL endpoints, rate limiting, auth enforcement, and API versioning

name: Implement cross-domain auth federation with OIDC
desc: Issue JWTs with aud claim covering all 9 domains, add OIDC discovery at headyapi.com/.well-known/openid-configuration

name: Build WebSocket reconnection with exponential backoff
desc: Add reconnection strategy to heady-manager.js voiceSessions WebSocket — use phi-exponential backoff on disconnect with client-side recovery

name: Replace ARENA fake scores with real LLM competition
desc: Replace rng()*40+60 scores in hc-full-pipeline.js:376-384 with actual LLM calls via InferenceGateway, compare real output quality

name: Build SSE pipeline streaming endpoint
desc: Add GET /api/pipeline/stream/:runId SSE handler to heady-manager.js — pipe HCFullPipeline stage events to browser clients in real-time

name: Wire real LLM calls to edge-diffusion.js
desc: Replace fake URL return in edge-diffusion.js:17-28 with real HuggingFace Inference API or Replicate call for actual image generation

name: Implement GCP Pub/Sub consumers for heady-swarm-tasks
desc: Build src/services/pubsub-consumer.js subscribing to heady-swarm-tasks, heady-admin-triggers, heady-dead-letter topics

name: Add dead-letter processor for failed Pub/Sub messages
desc: Process heady-dead-letter topic — retry with strategy shift, escalate to auto-success engine after 3 failed retries

name: Build MCP Client for external LLM MCP servers
desc: Implement @modelcontextprotocol/sdk MCP Client in src/mcp/mcp-client.js — connect to Claude MCP endpoint and other external MCP services

name: Build headymcp-core with 31 MCP tools
desc: Implement 31 MCP tools in headymcp-core — cover all 9 Heady domains with JSON-RPC 2.0 compliant tool definitions and handlers

name: Build headyapi-core as production API gateway
desc: Implement headyapi-core/gateway.js with full auth middleware, route versioning, rate limiting, and Cloudflare Worker proxy

name: Build headyos-core kernel services
desc: Implement kernel.js (process manager), scheduler.js (wrap autonomous-scheduler with cron API), IPC bus for headyos-core

name: Build headybuddy-core service with chat and memory APIs
desc: Implement buddy-service.js, chat-api.js, memory-api.js in headybuddy-core — full REST API for HeadyBuddy hosted at headybuddy.org

name: Create @heady-ai/shared npm package
desc: Build packages/heady-shared/ with phi.js, logger.js, circuit-breaker.js, exponential-backoff.js, errors.js for all 9 core repos

name: Add SSRF protection to BeeFactory health-check template
desc: In bee-factory.js:191-211, validate fetch URL against allowlist and block RFC-1918/link-local addresses before executing health checks

name: Implement webhook dispatcher with HMAC-SHA256 signatures
desc: Build src/integrations/heady-webhook-dispatcher.js with delivery queue, HMAC signing, phi-exponential backoff retries, and dead-letter

name: Add distributed trace IDs across all services
desc: Generate X-Heady-Trace-Id on ingress, thread through all sub-calls, correlate in structured logs — implement in heady-observability.js

name: Export self-awareness telemetry to Prometheus
desc: Add Prometheus counter/gauge export to self-awareness.js telemetry — emit /metrics endpoint for external scraping

name: Add LLM token usage tracking to distributed traces
desc: Correlate budget-tracker.js token costs with trace IDs — enable 'which pipeline runs are most expensive?' queries

name: Define SLO error rates and alerting thresholds
desc: Configure SLO targets in heady-config-server.js: error rate <1%, p99 latency <2000ms, uptime >99.9% — wire into self-awareness alerts

name: Implement multi-region Cloud Run deployment
desc: Add europe-west1 as secondary region in heady-registry.json, configure Cloudflare routing to nearest healthy region

name: Build blue/green deployment pipeline (liquid-deploy.yml)
desc: Create .github/workflows/liquid-deploy.yml with blue/green Cloud Run service swap, health verification before traffic cutover

name: Fix BeeFactory BEES_DIR to data/dynamic-bees/
desc: Change BEES_DIR in bee-factory.js:35 from __dirname to path.join(__dirname,'../../data/dynamic-bees') and add to .gitignore

name: Build HeadySentinel chaos engineering orchestrator
desc: Build src/resilience/heady-sentinel.js — proactively injects controlled failures to test resilience before production deploys

name: Wire HeadySentinel into pre-deploy pipeline gate
desc: Run chaos probe in QUALITY_GATE stage — inject latency spike and verify circuit breakers trip and recover within SLO

name: Build HeadyMemex temporal graph memory
desc: Build src/memory/heady-memex.js — cross-device context persistence with temporal graph tracking WHAT was discussed and WHEN

name: Wire HeadyMemex into HeadyBuddy cross-session memory
desc: On session end, persist conversation context to HeadyMemex — on new session, restore context with recency-weighted retrieval

name: Build HeadyArena shadow simulation environment
desc: Build src/arena/shadow-sim.js — run candidate changes against production traffic shadows using Colab Pro+ GPUs before merge

name: Add multi-tenant namespace isolation to VectorMemory
desc: Enforce namespace=user:<userId> at API layer in vector-memory.js — prevent cross-user namespace reads, add per-user quota enforcement

name: Build Swarm Dashboard with real-time bee status grid
desc: Build apps/headyweb/src/pages/SwarmDashboard.tsx — WebSocket connection to HeadyConductor events, bee status grid, pipeline timeline

name: Wire Swarm Dashboard to 3D vector space viewer
desc: Add Three.js 3D vector topology view to SwarmDashboard using the 3D topology API at /api/vector/topology

name: Build Governance Dashboard for projection receipt explorer
desc: Build GovernanceDashboard.tsx showing hash-chained receipt visualization, projection freshness, and audit timeline

name: Build Heady Intelligence Feed (RSS -> vector memory)
desc: Build src/intelligence/heady-feed.js — ingest RSS/news sources, embed articles into vector memory with source metadata, surface in INTAKE stage

name: Build cross-domain federated search API
desc: Add POST /api/search to heady-manager.js — fan out to vector memory, GitHub API, email, and docs; merge results by relevance score

name: Build HeadyLearn educational platform at headyu.com
desc: Scaffold headylearn-core with interactive tutorials for Heady architecture, CSL math, sacred geometry — onboard pilot partners

name: Wire real-time LLM cost billing to Stripe
desc: Extend budget-tracker.js with Stripe subscription enforcement — Free:10k/day, Pro:500k/day, Sovereign:unlimited token budgets

name: Build usage analytics dashboard at headyme.com/settings/usage
desc: Build UsageDashboard.tsx showing per-user LLM token consumption, cost trends, and tier limits with upgrade prompts

name: Add internal rate limiting between services
desc: Implement token-bucket rate limiting in heady-service-mesh.js per service pair — prevent any single service from exhausting LLM budget

name: Implement MIDI/Music Intelligence Layer
desc: Build src/intelligence/heady-midi.js — MIDI note parsing, semantic encoding into vector space, DAW integration via daw-mcp-bridge

name: Add A/B testing framework for pipeline stages
desc: Route X% of ARENA traffic to alternative stage implementations, collect metrics per variant, auto-promote winning variant after N samples

name: Fix self-awareness vectorMemory require to use instance
desc: In self-awareness.js:33-34, import VectorMemory class and instantiate it — fix runtime failure at ingestMemory() call on line 173

name: Fix buddy-core learnedRules Array to Map for O(1) lookup
desc: In buddy-core.js:139, convert learnedRules from Array to Map<errorKey, rule> — fix O(n) find() on every error interception

name: Fix buddy-core audit log from appendFileSync to async queue
desc: In buddy-core.js:1069, buffer audit entries in memory array and flush async with drain interval — fix event loop blocking

name: Fix ternary-logic shadow index JSON.stringify to hash set
desc: In ternary-logic.js:127-134, maintain Set<string> of hashed fingerprints for O(1) duplicate detection instead of JSON comparison

name: Export edge-diffusion as class not singleton
desc: In edge-diffusion.js:30, change module.exports = new EdgeDiffusion() to module.exports = { EdgeDiffusion } to allow DI and testing

name: Add Prometheus alerting rules for error SLOs
desc: Create configs/prometheus-alerts.yml with error rate >1% and p99 >2000ms alerting rules tied to self-awareness ring buffer

name: Implement database backup automation and restore testing
desc: Create scripts/backup-verify.sh — run nightly pg_dump, verify restore to test DB, report success/failure to monitoring endpoint

name: Wire MIDI intelligence into HeadyBuddy creative mode
desc: When buddy receives music-related queries, route through MIDI intelligence layer for music-theory-aware responses

name: Fix TernaryLogic destroy() is never called
desc: In all code that creates TernaryDecisionMatrix instances, ensure destroy() is called on cleanup to prevent timer accumulation

name: Validate VECTOR_SHARD_PATH at startup
desc: In heady-manager.js Phase 4 (vector-stack), validate VECTOR_SHARD_PATH exists, is writable, and has sufficient space before proceeding

name: Add per-phase error isolation to heady-manager bootstrap
desc: Wrap each of the 10 heady-manager.js bootstrap phases in try/catch with degraded-mode flag — allow partial boot on phase failure

name: Add compressed Vector JSON-lines persistence
desc: In vector-memory.js persist(), add optional zlib compression to reduce file size by 60% — decompress on load()

name: Downgrade VectorMemory from Float64 to Float32
desc: In vector-memory.js:49-52, change Float64Array to Float32Array — halve memory usage, same embedding precision for 384-dim vectors

name: Add O(1) bee category index to HeadyConductor
desc: Add _categoryIndex = Map<taskType, beeId[]> to heady-conductor.js updated on registerBee() — replace O(n) dispatch loop

name: Add taskType validation to Conductor dispatch endpoint
desc: In heady-conductor.js:242-250, validate taskType is alphanumeric-only string before dispatch to prevent prototype pollution

name: Add URL allowlist validation to BeeFactory health checks
desc: In bee-factory.js:191-211, validate fetch URL against domain allowlist and block 169.254.x.x, 10.x.x.x, 192.168.x.x SSRF vectors

name: Build HeadyOS kernel process manager
desc: Build packages/headyos-core/src/kernel.js — process lifecycle manager for bees: spawn, terminate, restart with resource accounting

name: Add Terraform for all 9 core repos
desc: Create infra/terraform/core-repos/ with Cloud Run service, IAM permissions, and secret bindings templates for each of the 9 core repos
